title: Enchanted Bare Bones
description: Introduces smooth animations and glowing emissive effects to items, adding magic while preserving the minimalist look of Bare Bones.
body: > [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enchanted-bare-bones) [![MyProfile](https://img.shields.io/badge/My%20Profile-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=teal)](https://modrinth.com/user/PrincParshia) [![Organization](https://img.shields.io/badge/Organization-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=grey)](https://modrinth.com/organization/cre8to-team) --- **!! [BARE BONES - EMISSIVE ORES](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-emissive-ores) IS REQUIRED FOR EXTRA ENHANCEMENT!!** --- ## 📗 DESCRIPTION Enchanted Bare Bones is a magical add-on for the Bare Bones texture pack, adding smooth animations and glowing emissive textures to items. It keeps the clean, minimalist style while making tools, weapons shine with a subtle, magical glow. The glowing effect enhances visibility and adds a unique charm without compromising the simple design. ## ❗ REQUIREMENTS > For **Fabric/Quilt/Neo/Forge**: Use **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**. > For **Forge/Other**: Use **[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)**. ---
